items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道 Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司把 AI 应用从代码生成扩展到 PRD 评审、code review 等更早的工程治理环节，并保留人类监督。这是行业实践综述而非具体产品发布，没有新的 SDK、API 字段或模型版本出现。已有 AI 代码助手/CI 集成可参考这些流程改造。
items.backend_focus: 可参考但非紧急：团队可评估把 AI 引入 PRD 评审和 code review 流程，关注能否集成到现有 CI/CD 中；本条不要求升级任何特定 SDK 或 API 版本。

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.original_summary: Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production. The framework uses a filesystem-based project structure to organize agent instructions, tools, skills, subagents, communication channels, and scheduled tasks, enabling developers to define agent behavior while reducing the amount of supporting infrastructure they need to implement. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Vercel 开源发布 Eve 框架，用于在生产环境构建、部署和运行 AI agent。它采用文件系统式项目结构来组织 agent 指令、tools、skills、subagent、通信渠道与定时任务。相对 LangChain / LangGraph 这类通用框架，Eve 把基础设施和声明式结构都内置进项目里，降低自建量但也意味着要遵循其约定。已有自研 agent 框架的团队需评估是否引入。
items.backend_focus: 评估引入：试用 Vercel Eve 开源框架，盘点现有 agent 项目是否可迁移到其文件系统式结构（agents / tools / skills 目录），关注其与现有 MCP / tool use / Responses API 的适配方式。短期不必替换生产框架，先做 PoC。

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.original_summary: Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring cryptographic trust, provenance, and tamper-evident execution records to distributed applications and AI agents. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Dapr 1.18 引入 Verifiable Execution，为分布式应用与 AI agent 提供加密可验证的执行记录、来源追踪与防篡改能力。相对此前的 Dapr 1.17，这是 runtime 层新能力，需要在 Dapr 配置文件里启用新组件。已用 Dapr 的服务需升级 control plane 与 sidecar，并关注新 API 兼容旧 workflow 调用。
items.backend_focus: 升级计划：把 Dapr 升级到 1.18，启用 Verifiable Execution 相关 component 配置；评估对现有 workflow 调用是否需改动 API；A/B 验证 agent 执行链路的可验证日志是否影响性能。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: 微软在 Build 2026 上对 AKS 做了大规模升级，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与 AI 基础设施层。相对普通托管 K8s，新形态让 AKS 可承载 AI 训练与推理工作负载，并支持跨集群 fleet 管理。已用 AKS 跑 AI 推理服务的团队可评估是否切换到 Bare Metal / Fleet 模式以获得更高性能。
items.backend_focus: 基础设施团队可关注：评估 AKS Bare Metal 与 Fleet Management 是否能承载现有 AI 训练 / 推理 workload，盘点 GPU 节点配额、跨 region 调度策略与 kubectl / API 版本兼容性，按官方升级文档分阶段切换。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，用于在 Apple Silicon 上跑端侧 LLM 与生成式 AI，支持 PyTorch 转出的自定义模型和预优化开源模型。相对 Core ML，Core AI 明确把 LLM/生成式 AI 列为第一类场景，并原生支持预优化开源模型。已有 Core ML 集成的应用需要按官方迁移指南升级到 Core AI。
items.backend_focus: iOS/macOS 团队规划迁移：盘点现有 Core ML 集成，把模型转换 pipeline 升级到 Core AI；关注是否需要更新 Xcode SDK 版本、替换 MLModel API 调用方式、调整端侧推理的内存与线程配置。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 推出 Chunk Sidecars，把 CI 风格的校验能力直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内层开发循环。相对传统 CI 流水线只在合并/PR 阶段校验，Chunk Sidecars 把校验前移到 agent 单次生成代码的循环里。已用 CircleCI + AI agent 的团队可以开启该能力以更早暴露失败。
items.backend_focus: CI 团队评估启用：在 CircleCI 中开启 Chunk Sidecars，让 AI agent 在单次代码生成循环里就触发 lint / unit test / build 校验；关注 sidecar 资源占用、缓存键设计与已有 step 的执行顺序是否冲突。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How it Happens and How to Detect it
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 发表长文系统讲解 ML 模型投毒攻击（label flipping、backdoor、clean-label poisoning、gradient manipulation 等）以及检测和防御方法。这是一篇工程实践科普文章，没有新框架或 API 发布。已有训练 pipeline 的团队可对照排查数据来源与供应链风险。
items.backend_focus: ML 平台 / 数据团队可行动：审计训练数据供应链、引入数据来源校验与异常标签检测；关注投毒检测工具（如 activation clustering / spectral signatures）能否集成到现有训练 pipeline 中。本条不要求升级特定 SDK。

items.title: AWS Previews FinOps Agent for Cost Analysis and Optimization
items.original_summary: Amazon has released AWS FinOps Agent in public preview, a managed service that automates several common FinOps workflows. The agent can investigate cost anomalies, correlate spend changes with AWS activity data, and integrate with tools such as Slack and Jira to route findings to resource owners. By Renato Losio
items.chinese_summary: AWS 在 public preview 阶段推出 FinOps Agent，用于自动化成本异常调查、关联 AWS 活动数据，并把结果路由到 Slack / Jira 等协作工具。相对此前的 Cost Explorer + 手动分析，FinOps Agent 把异常归因与告警分发自动化。这是 managed agent 服务，不需要自建 LLM 流程。
items.backend_focus: FinOps / SRE 团队评估接入：在 AWS 控制台开启 FinOps Agent preview，配置 Slack / Jira 通知通道与 AWS 活动数据源；预留独立 IAM 权限给该 agent 读取 Cost Explorer / CloudTrail。短期不影响现有成本监控代码。

items.title: Article: Why Vector Search Alone Isn't Enough: Hybrid Retrieval for RAG
items.original_summary: In this article, author Aaditya Chauhan discusses the limitations of RAG pipelines based purely on vector search and how an internal omni-search application using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) that combines BM25 and vector results, can enhance the search solution. By Aaditya Chauhan
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 技术文章讨论纯向量检索在 RAG 中的局限，并介绍通过 Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) 融合 BM25 与向量结果的混合检索方案。属于工程实践与方法论文章，没有新框架或 API 发布。已有 RAG 服务的团队可参考引入 hybrid retrieval。
items.backend_focus: RAG 团队可参考：在现有向量检索 pipeline 中加入 BM25（Elasticsearch / OpenSearch）召回，再用 RRF 与向量结果融合；评估是否需要在 retriever 抽象层增加 keyword 召回分支。本条不要求升级特定 SDK 版本。
